title: crataegus × dispessa
intro: Crataegus × dispessa is a hybrid hawthorn plant, resulting from the cross between the Crataegus monogyna and the Crataegus laevigata species. The medicinal properties of Crataegus × dispessa lie in its rich content of flavonoids, such as quercetin and rutin, which have been traditionally used to treat cardiovascular issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Crataegus × dispessa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
